generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks.
Place AGREE contracts within the correct AADL scope (component type or implementation).
Use visible identifiers (ports, features) in AGREE expressions.
Ensure temporal recurrence uses initialized expressions (e.g., `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`).
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions without corresponding ports or constants.
